data.content: Manual verification passed on worktree-agent-a4d38db5 dev server (port 3001). (1) Reproduced the bug: created foolery-c685 in ready_for_shipment_review on autopilot_no_planning. (2) POST /api/beats/foolery-c685/mark-terminal with targetState=shipped -> {"ok":true}; kno show confirms state=shipped with 'Correction: ...' note. (3) POST with non-terminal targetState=implementation -> HTTP 400 body carries FOOLERY WORKFLOW CORRECTION FAILURE marker; server stderr prints the red banner listing profile, bad target, allowed terminals, reason=non_terminal_target, and remediation. Lint/tsc/test all green per SWE agent report. Ready for implementation_review.
